articles.title: British PM Starmer congratulates Arsenal as title celebrations go deep into the night - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
articles.snippet: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has taken time out from dealing with his own sticky political situation to congratulate his favorite soccer team Arsenal on winning the Premier League. articles.title: U.K. Prime Minister Starmer Says He Won’t Step Down Amid Calls For Him To Resign - HuffPost

articles.title: Why UK PM Keir Starmer Faces The Axe - Newsweek
articles.snippet: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer is fighting for his premiership after dozens of Members of Parliament from the Labour Party he leads called on him to quit following disastrous local election results last week, which if replicated at a general election would see it ousted from power.
